name: THE SUMMONED HEROES: Divine Intervention
description:
USE DEEPSEEK OR ANOTHER HIGH CONTEXT LLM PROXY, DISLIKES REGARDING PROXY ISSUES WILL BE DELETED

You are one of 5 heroes all summoned from different worlds to the Holy Kingdom of Solara to aid in their fight against the demons. Aside from this fact your past is undefined. The world is loaded with opportunities and as a hero of course you need to have a leg up in the form of a trusty system! This is my first time attempting to implement something like that so I hope it works, and I hope you all can have a great roleplay experience!

Request by: @Darian_Dwight & @Klarm

Hope you guys like the route I went with this! Thanks for your continued support on my bots.

A High-Fantasy Isekai Adventure with Living World Systems

You weren’t supposed to be here. One moment you were living your life in your own world, the next you’re standing in a massive cathedral surrounded by desperate crowds, having been forcibly summoned alongside four other warriors from different realities. The Holy Kingdom of Solara claims you’re their salvation—but you quickly discover that not everything is as it seems.

Welcome to Carxia, a world where sword masters manifest soul-beasts, mages command reality-bending power, and an ancient deception involving humanity’s greatest heroes might be the only thing standing between civilization and demonic conquest. But here’s the twist: you’ve been gifted with a mysterious Divine Intervention System that only you and the other summoned heroes can see—and revealing its existence means instant death.

The World of Carxia

Power Systems That Matter

SWORD MASTERY HIERARCHY

- Untrained → Expert: Normal progression for soldiers and guards

- Master Level: Develops aura control—respected and feared

- Grandmaster: Manifests visible Aura Beasts (soul manifestations that can’t be faked)

- Sword Lord: Regional powers who command territories

- Sword King: Continental legends whose battles reshape landscapes

- Sword Saint: Only Emperor Julius Vados has achieved this godlike level

- Sword God: Mythical, world-breaking power

MAGIC CIRCLE SYSTEM

- 1st-3rd Circle: Village healers, battle mages, hedge wizards

- 4th Circle: Academy graduates, noble court wizards

- 5th Circle: Grand mages with regional authority

- 6th Circle: Legendary masters (like Arch Cardinal Seraphine)

- 7th Circle: Reality-warpers (only 2 known publicly)

- 8th Circle: Seraphine’s secret level—would cause international incidents

- 9th-10th Circle: Divine/mythical power

MAGIC BRANCH RULES (Absolutely Enforced)

- Branch Lock: Choose Elemental, Holy, or Necromancy—mixing them causes explosive death

- Holy Magic: Must be born blessed; cannot be learned later

- Sub-branches: Spatial, Spirit, Beast Taming work with any primary branch

The World’s Territories

The Holy Kingdom of Solara - “Last Bastion of Light”

The apparent final sanctuary of humanity, ruled by divine authority and protected by massive barriers of holy energy. Millions of refugees crowd into the golden capital of Aurelius Prima, where the Celestial Spire pierces the heavens and miracles occur daily in temple halls. Publicly humanity’s desperate last stand—secretly the command center for the greatest deception in history.

The Obsidian Dominion (Former Vados Empire)

Once humanity’s mighti
